meta_title: For Freelancers: project management to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Master Debugging: Project Management for AI Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Learn professional project management and AI-assisted debugging using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster for clients.
content.answer_block: Debugging isn't just code; it's a structural failure. By adopting a rigid project management framework, you isolate logic, track state changes, and use AI agents like Claude Code to perform diagnostic analysis. This systematic approach turns chaotic bug-hunting into a repeatable, high-velocity workflow that ensures client-ready, production-grade applications every time.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and your terminal is bleeding red errors. You're staring at a stack trace that looks like an alien language, and the sinking feeling of a missed deadline is settling in. You aren't failing because you can't code; you're failing because you are debugging without a roadmap.

Professional development isn't just about writing syntax; it's about managing complexity. When you treat your codebase like a managed project rather than a wild animal, you gain the upper hand. By integrating AI-driven diagnostic tools, you shift from guessing to engineering, transforming your frantic troubleshooting into a clinical, efficient process.

steps.title: Define the Failure Boundary
steps.description: Before fixing, map the exact scope of the bug. Use Antigravity to document the expected vs. actual state to ensure you aren't chasing ghosts.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current codebase structure and identify the most likely modules causing the recent runtime crash based on the provided logs.

steps.title: Isolate Dependencies
steps.description: Bugs often hide in external calls. Use Claude Code to stub out dependencies and verify if the logic error is internal or integration-based.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a dependency isolation plan for the service layer to test if the API integration is causing the null pointer exception.

steps.title: Automate State Tracking
steps.description: Use AI to inject temporary, non-intrusive logging across critical paths to visualize state mutations in real-time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a non-breaking logging wrapper for these functions that tracks variable state changes without altering existing business logic.

steps.title: Perform Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Feed the gathered logs and state data back into Claude Code to get a definitive diagnosis instead of manual trial-and-error.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Based on the state logs, provide a root cause analysis for the intermittent data corruption issue in the user session handler.

steps.title: Validate and Deploy
steps.description: Once the fix is applied, run a regression suite to ensure the fix hasn't introduced new bugs elsewhere in the project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a regression test script that covers the fixed module and its integration points with the rest of the application.

pro_tips: Never debug in production; always replicate the state in a local Docker container managed by Antigravity.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to store common project patterns so it understands your specific architectural constraints.
If a bug takes longer than 30 minutes to find, stop; you are missing a structural assumption, not a syntax error.
Treat your bug reports as client deliverables—documenting how you fixed it adds immense value to your service invoice.
Always maintain a 'Last Known Good' git branch specifically for AI-assisted debugging sessions to allow for rapid rollbacks.
content.next_steps: Implement a standardized 'Bug-Fix Protocol' document that you attach to every client project to streamline your future support requests.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting hours in the terminal and start shipping with the confidence of a lead engineer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
